Package i5.cb.telos.object

Interface ITelosObjectSet

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ObjectBaseInterface, TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl, TelosObjectSetSimpleSixSetsImpl

    public interface ITelosObjectSet
    Set of Telos objects (aka "Objektspeicher"). This interface allows multiple object storage implementations, such as "6 eggs" or "2 eggs" or "0 eggs" implementations. A Telos object set contains instances of TelosObject, also known as propositions. [Say something about Telos axioms here - some are checked, some are not.] Implementors must at least define a default constructor, which creates an empty object set.

      makes the set empty
      java.lang.Object clone​()
      Cloning must be supported by implementing classes.
      boolean contains​(TelosObject object)
      Note that an if an object set contains a proposition p=(id,x,l,y) it does not necessarily contain x or y.

      convenience function to get the only member of a set that contains exactly one element.

      boolean isA​(TelosObject o1, TelosObject o2)

      shortcut for size() == 0

      void remove​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
      removes a set of objects from this.
      void remove​(TelosObject object)
      removes object from this.
      int size​()  
      java.util.Enumeration sortedElements​()
      Returns an enumeration of the objects in a lexical order

    • Method Detail

      • clone

        java.lang.Object clone​()
        Cloning must be supported by implementing classes. Note that we don't throw a CloneNotSupportedException here. The clone is deep enough so changing the clone won't change the original and vice-versa.

      • contains

        boolean contains​(TelosObject object)
        Note that an if an object set contains a proposition p=(id,x,l,y) it does not necessarily contain x or y. Maybe this is the most important feature which MiniTelos does not have.
        Returns:
        Does this contain object?

      • size

        int size​()
        Returns:
        the size of this set, that is the number of Telos objects this currently contains

      • isEmpty

        boolean isEmpty​()
        shortcut for size() == 0

      • getTheOnlyMember

        TelosObject getTheOnlyMember​()
                      throws java.lang.Exception
        convenience function to get the only member of a set that contains exactly one element.
        Returns:
        null, if this is empty. o, if o is the only member of this.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if size() greater-than 1

      • add

        void add​(TelosObject object)
        adds object to this. If this already contains object, nothing happens. Otherwise, some[?] Telos axioms a checked. [not yet!]

      • remove

        void remove​(TelosObject object)
        removes object from this. If this does not contain object, nothing happens.

      • add

        void add​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
        adds a set of objects to this. If any of the objects is already contained in this, it is simply ignored.

      • remove

        void remove​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
        removes a set of objects from this. If any of the objects is not contained in this, it is simply ignored.

      • clear

        void clear​()
        makes the set empty

      • getIndividual

        Individual getIndividual​(java.lang.String sLabel)
        Returns:
        the individual with the given label, if present, null otherwise

      • getInstantiation

        Instantiation getInstantiation​(TelosObject source,
                               TelosObject destination)
        Returns:
        the instantiation object with the given source and destination, if present, null otherwise. Only explicitly contained instantiation objects, not implicit relationships (contained in the transitive 'in' closure) are returned.

      • getSpecialization

        Specialization getSpecialization​(TelosObject source,
                                 TelosObject destination)
        Returns:
        the specialization object with the given source and destination, if present, null otherwise. Only explicitly contained specialization objects, not implicit relationships (contained in the transitive 'isA' closure) are returned.

      • getAttribute

        Attribute getAttribute​(TelosObject source,
                       java.lang.String sLabel)
        Returns:
        the attribute object with the given source and label

      • getObject

        TelosObject getObject​(TelosObject source,
                      java.lang.String sLabel,
                      TelosObject destination)
        Returns:
        the object with the given source, label and destination, if present, null otherwise

      • getInstantiationsOf

        ITelosObjectSet getInstantiationsOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the instantiation links that go into o

      • getClassificationsOf

        ITelosObjectSet getClassificationsOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the instantiation (classification) links that come out of o

      • getSpecializationsFrom

        ITelosObjectSet getSpecializationsFrom​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the specialization links that go into o

      • getGeneralizationsFrom

        ITelosObjectSet getGeneralizationsFrom​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the specialization (generalization) links that come out of o

      • getAttributesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o

      • getAttributesTo

        ITelosObjectSet getAttributesTo​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the attribute links that go into o

      • getAttributesOfCategory

        ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                        Attribute attrCategory)
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o and are instance of the given category.

      • getAttributesOfExplicitCategory

        ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                                Attribute attrCategory)
        This is a special case which is often needed (e.g in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory.
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o and are explicit instance of the given category.

      • getSingleAttributeOfCategory

        Attribute getSingleAttributeOfCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                       Attribute attrCategory)
                                throws java.lang.Exception
        Returns:
        the single attribute of the given category that comes out of o, if any. null, if none.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if there is more than one attribute of o with the given category.

      • getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory

        Attribute getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                               Attribute attrCategory)
                                        throws java.lang.Exception
        This is a special case which is often needed (e.g. in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory; There is no error handling, if there is more than one category.
        Returns:
        the attribute of the given category that comes out of o, if any. null, if none.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception
        See Also:
        getAttributesOfExplicitCategory(i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject, i5.cb.telos.object.Attribute)

      • getOutgoingLinksOf

        ITelosObjectSet getOutgoingLinksOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the links that come out of o

      • getIncomingLinksOf

        ITelosObjectSet getIncomingLinksOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the links that go into o

      • getExplicitClassesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getExplicitClassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared classes of o

      • getExplicitInstancesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getExplicitInstancesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared instances of o

      • getExplicitSuperclassesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSuperclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared superclasses of o

      • getExplicitSubclassesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSubclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the individuals that are direct (or explicit) subclasses of o

      • getAllSubclassesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getAllSubclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        This function returns the transitive closure of (x isA o).
        Returns:
        the individuals that are subclasses of o, even those which are indirect (or implicit) subclasses.

      • getAllInstancesOf

        ITelosObjectSet getAllInstancesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result in o)

      • isExplicitClassOf

        boolean isExplicitClassOf​(TelosObject o1,
                          TelosObject o2)
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result in o)

      • isExplicitInstanceOf

        boolean isExplicitInstanceOf​(TelosObject o1,
                             TelosObject o2)

      • isExplicitSuperclassOf

        boolean isExplicitSuperclassOf​(TelosObject o1,
                               TelosObject o2)

      • isExplicitSubclassOf

        boolean isExplicitSubclassOf​(TelosObject o1,
                             TelosObject o2)

      • isA

        boolean isA​(TelosObject o1,
            TelosObject o2)
        Returns:
        o1 isA o2 ?

      • in

        boolean in​(TelosObject o1,
           TelosObject o2)
        Returns:
        o1 in o2 ?

      • elements

        java.util.Enumeration elements​()
        Returns:
        enumeration of all contained objects

      • sortedElements

        java.util.Enumeration sortedElements​()
        Returns an enumeration of the objects in a lexical order
        Returns:
        a java.util.Enumeration value

      • asPropositions

        java.lang.String asPropositions​()
        Returns:
        proposition representation, like "P(oid,src,label,dest)"
